title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Franky, Tama, Unknown person #6 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAH!! We were so high up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ALL RIGHT!! WE HAVE OUR ORDERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That brat clearly doesn't know her place. Crush her!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Your wish is my command, Master!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Yeah!! Leave it to us, Master!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why are they obeying that brat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Waaah! Hamlet- Sama has lost his mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll take care of these bums,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the fourth floor!! Poker-sama, the headliner, has turned on us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're here to back you Samural up!!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: The straw hats have to win!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What in the world is happening?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gifters are tearing through the third floor too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the right brain tower!! They're running wild!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The basement has also been compro- missed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the hell is happen- ing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ONI- Gashima has fallen into chaos!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the pond at the Red Light District by the left brain tower...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... this is all because of that brat?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 48 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
